name: Forep Man
short_description: Use Blocks and Physics to reach the goal. You can use blocks to slow you down or bounce you up. There are different types of blocks.
detailed_description:
Forep Man involves using physics to reach the goal. You can use blocks to slow you down or bounce you up, but you only a have watch out. There are different types of blocks. Green blocks are used to Forep from falling into pits. Yellow blocks are used to help cross wide gaps. Red blocks are a hazard to Forep.
Complete the game to unlock 3 new modes.


  • Feature's:

  • Cloud Saving
Upload Your Save File and Continue on Another Computer

  • Leaderboard's

  • Achievement's
